bio: Shawne is a fine art photographer whose work examines light, place, and quiet human presence. Based in the United States, they exhibit internationally and maintain a studio practice grounded in slow observation and careful printing.
statement: Photography, for me, is a way of holding still — of finding structure inside ordinary moments. The camera is neither witness nor judge; it is a tool for patience. These pictures ask for time: yours and mine.

exhibitions.detail: Placeholder Group Exhibition — City Art Museum (forthcoming)
